title: aden + anais Cotton Muslin Swaddle - 2 Pack Squares | Large Receiving Blankets for Girls & Boys | Ideal Newborn Babies & Infant Swaddling Wrap Set | Perfect Earthly, 120x120cm
features: ☁️ SUPER DURABLE QUALITY: Our extraordinarily high quality 1 layer organic muslin means superior breathability, natural give, pre-washed softness & durability. Baby essentials which last a lifetime and provide happiness throughout generations!

🍼 PERFECT FOR: Our large & thin size provides you & your little one with enough space for wrapping & swaddling without having to fear that they will outgrow the blanket too soon! You can also perfectly use our baby blankets, receiving blanket, swaddle sack, sunshade, breastfeeding nursing cover and more.

💤 NO MORE SLEEPLESS NIGHTS: Keep your little one from overheating whilst providing them with a nice comfy blanket. Swaddling recreates the snugness of the womb so your baby is provided with a well-deserved good night's sleep and enjoys the benefits of the most natural & soothing ways of sleeping.

📐 SIZE & MEASUREMENTS: Our muslin swaddles for newborn babies sets include 2 swaddles, so you'll always have an extra on hand. The muslins measure 120cm x 120cm square (47.2inch x 47.2inch). Machine washable & dryer safe.

💙 ABOUT ADEN + ANAIS: The original brand of design-conscious muslin must-haves, offering stylish, versatile comfort for mum and baby. Founded by an Aussie mum on a mission, aden + anais brought muslin to the world at large & quickly gained the trust of parents by delivering quality products.
description: Product Description DISCLOSURE: GOTS Certification is awarded by Oregon Tilth Organization. Place and Date of Issue: 2022-11-03, Corvallis, OR.
